title: anthoxanthum redolens var. longifolium
intro: Anthoxanthum redolens var. longifolium, also known as sweet vernal grass, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the grass family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of sweet vernal grass include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and alleviating symptoms of allergies. Sweet vernal grass can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
